name: Golf 365 North Town
about: Golf 365 is a golf simulator venue in Sheboygan County, Wisconsin, with two locations: Northtown and Indiana Avenue. It offers year-round golf access using state-of-the-art Uneekor Eye XO launch monitors with GSPro simulation software, featuring a wide selection of real and fantasy golf courses. The venue operates with a simple, hourly pricing model and also provides a full bar and food menu, club rentals, fitting services, and the option to host private events or join seasonal leagues. It is designed to be a casual and welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels, particularly appealing to those in areas with short outdoor seasons.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf access regardless of Wisconsin's harsh winter weather
State-of-the-art Uneekor Eye XO launch monitors and GSPro software for high-quality simulation
Variety of games and formats available, including mini golf and golf darts
Full service bar and food menu to enhance the social experience
Private rooms available for lessons and fittings, as well as group events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with food menu, featuring brisket smashburgers at North Town and Deo's pizzas at Indiana Avenue, as well as fresh pizza from local restaurants.
Full service bar available at both locations.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors installed in all simulator bays.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at both locations. You can also purchase clubs, accessories, and get regripping services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides a full bar and food menu at both locations, with signature items like brisket smashburgers and local pizza.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard play on the simulator is typically a 9-hole experience, lasting about one hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers non-golf entertainment such as dart boards, cornhole boards, and a casual atmosphere suitable for all ages.
